title: deep steel
description: Adds a rare ore called Deep Steel that can be reforged into Reinforced Deep Steel for powerful endgame tools and armor, a new dimension to explore, and a special Deep Apple
body:
📖 

Reinforced Deep Steel expands Minecraft’s endgame with new materials, gear, and a mysterious dimension.

Deep underground, you’ll find Deep Steel Ore, a rare resource stronger than Netherite. By refining it, you can craft Reinforced Deep Steel, used to make some of the most powerful tools and armor in the game.

The mod also adds a new dimension filled with unique terrain, dangerous mobs, and valuable materials tied to the origin of Deep Steel.

And for adventurers seeking an extra boost, there’s the Deep Apple — a rare, craftable item that grants powerful temporary buffs to help you survive the toughest battles.

🔹 Features

Deep Steel Ore — a rare high-tier material found deep underground

Reinforced Deep Steel — used to craft extremely durable and powerful gear

OP tools and armor for true endgame players

A new dimension filled with exclusive terrain and resources

Deep Apple — a special consumable 


⚒️ Compatibility

Minecraft Version: 1.20+

Mod Loader: Forge

Environment: Client and Server

💡 Why Use This Mod?

If you’ve already mastered Netherite, Reinforced Deep Steel gives you a new reason to explore deeper, craft smarter, and fight harder. Forge your ultimate gear, harness the power of the Deep Apple, and conquer an entirely new dimension.
